---
title: "Links"
---

## Collaborations

- [Selvica — Causal Impact Evaluation for Conservation](https://scb-impact.org) — Web platform for assessing the causal impact of conservation interventions on deforestation, agriculture, biodiversity, and carbon savings.

## UT Dallas

- [School of Economic, Political and Policy Sciences (EPPS)](https://epps.utdallas.edu/) — Our home school at UT Dallas.
